headline: Should You Buy UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH)’s Shares?
summary: We recently published David Tepper Stock Portfolio: 10 Long-Term Stock Picks. UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the long-term stock picks. David Tepper’s Appaloosa Management has held a stake in health insurance giant UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH)’s shares since the fourth quarter of 2010. It held the shares until the second quarter of 2011. […]

headline: Alphabet makes the Dow look more like the Nasdaq
summary: Alphabet's inclusion in the Dow gives the 130-year-old blue-chip index a dose of the same mega-cap tech trade already dominating the Nasdaq 100 (^NDX).

headline: Can Humana's Margin Recovery Drive Long-Term Earnings Growth?
summary: HUM is shifting from membership growth to profitability, with lower medical costs, rising CenterWell revenues, and a margin recovery plan through 2028.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on UnitedHealth Group, Raises Price Target to $475
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Kevin Fischbeck   maintains UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) with a Buy and raises the price target from $450 to $475.

headline: 2 Reasons to Like UNH and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: UnitedHealth’s 24.5% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 16.7%, and its stock price has climbed to $407.86 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
